author: Syed Fazli
content: The pricing calculator on the homepage is performing well. Consider A/B testing the CTA button text — 'Get an instant estimate' vs 'See project cost'.

author: Syed Fazli
content: Newsletter subscriber list is growing. Set a reminder to send the first broadcast once we hit 50 subscribers. Use Nodemailer or switch to Resend.

author: Syed Fazli
content: The HubSpot and Notion integrations are stubs. When a real CRM token is available, test POST /api/integrations/hubspot manually first before enabling in the lead pipeline.

author: Syed Fazli
content: Blog category pages and tag pages are live. Start internal linking from service pages to relevant blog posts. The categoryInternalLinks map in lib/blog.ts should be expanded.

author: Syed Fazli
content: Solutions pages for chatbot, LMS builder, and automation are live. Next step: add a /solutions overview page that links to all three, with a comparison table.

author: Syed Fazli
content: Lead scoring is live. Hot leads (score ≥60) should be followed up within 2 hours. Check the admin dashboard daily for new hot leads.
